  "findings": [
    "Cold joint visible between concrete lifts",
    "Lack of consolidation and bonding between successive concrete layers"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Evaluate structural integrity of the cold joint",
    "Consult structural engineer for remediation options such as epoxy injection or replacement"
  ],
  "rationale": "A visible cold joint indicates that the first lift of concrete had partially set before the next lift was placed, preventing proper consolidation and bonding. This creates a plane of weakness and potential water intrusion, violating ACI 301 and 304 standards for continuous placement and consolidation.",
  "references": [
    "ACI 301 Specifications for Structural Concrete",
    "ACI 304R Guide for Measuring, Mixing, Transporting, and Placing Concrete"
  ]
}
